title: Tx_Force, Ty_Force, Tz_Force Status
description: This returns torque data for the specified axis.
notes: This property is used to confirm the torque data for the specified axis of the force coordinate system specified by the CoordinateSystem.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
 Ty_Force, Tz_Force Status

Fx_Force, Fy_Force, Fz_Force Status
examples:
Function Test_Tx_Force Real rVar FSet FCS1.Position, 0, 0, 100 FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 1 FSet FM1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1 FGet FM1.Tx_Force, rVar Print rVar
Fend
